encounter.reason: First pregnancy confirmation and early monitoring
encounter.location: Rocky Mountain Women's Health, Denver, CO

labs.name: serum beta-hCG
labs.note: consistent with early pregnancy at approximately 4-5 weeks gestation

labs.name: serum beta-hCG
labs.note: 48-hour repeat; appropriate doubling demonstrated, calculated doubling time approximately 43 hours

conditions.name: early intrauterine pregnancy, approximately 4 weeks 5 days gestation by last menstrual period
conditions.note: confirmed by positive serum beta-hCG with appropriate 48-hour doubling kinetics; estimated due date 2025-01-03

medications.name: prenatal vitamin with folic acid, one tablet by mouth daily
medications.sig: Take one tablet by mouth daily

document_references.description: Office visit note documenting a 34-year-old G1P0 woman presenting for pregnancy confirmation after positive home pregnancy test. Includes vital signs, serum beta-hCG results with appropriate 48-hour doubling, assessment of early intrauterine pregnancy at approximately 4 weeks 5 days by LMP (EDD 2025-01-03), counseling on early pregnancy symptoms and warning signs, dietary guidance, continuation of prenatal vitamins, and plan for 6-week transvaginal ultrasound follow-up.
